headline: Woman's 'I'm Just Being Honest' Is Actually Just Her Being Rude, She Calls It 'Authenticity'
summary: She told her friend her dress was 'unflattering.' Her friend has not spoken to her in 3 years. She's 'unbothered.'
fullBody: Amanda BrutalHonesty prides herself on 'telling it like it is.' She told her friend her wedding dress was 'a choice.' 'I'm just being honest,' Amanda said. Her friend is now her ex-friend. 'She's toxic,' Amanda said. 'I'm authentic.' Her friends have started a 'no Amanda' group chat. Amanda is not in it. She doesn't know about it. She's 'unbothered.' She's also alone.
